name: Berghoff Ragout (Ragout a La Berghof)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the round steak into thin strips.
2. Melt half a cup of butter in a large frying pan and brown the meat over medium-high heat.
3. Remove the browned meat from the pan.
4. In the remaining butter, sauté onion for 2 minutes.
5. Add green bell pepper and mushrooms, and cook an additional 3 minutes.
6. Melt another quarter cup of butter and add flour.
7. Gradually add beef broth while stirring until the mixture thickens.
8. Stir in white wine and seasonings (salt, Worcestershire sauce, and Tabasco sauce).
9. Add back the meat and mushroom mixture to the pan.
10. Cover and simmer for 45 minutes to 1 hour, or until the meat is tender.
11. Serve with buttered noodles or dumplings.
